 * Add these extracted variables to your tailwind.config.js / globals.css to restore original colors.
 *

 *   --blur-md: 12px;

 *   --default-transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
 *   --font-weight-bold: 500;
 *   --font-weight-normal: 400;

 *   --text-base--line-height: 1.5;
 *   --text-base--optical-size: 16.2;
